Title: You Digg?
Description: Digg was just opened to the public in January 2026. After facing a swarm of AI bots, they decided to shutdown once more. I will mourn them in peace again.

Title: 1M context is now generally available for Opus 4.6 and Sonnet 4.6 | Claude
Description: Standard pricing now applies across the full 1M window for both models, with no long-context premium. Media limits expand to 600 images or PDF pages.

Title: Your Phone is an Entire Computer
Description: The new MacBook Neo announcement raises old questions around what rights we have (and don't have) to install software on devices we own.
